name: qa-pair-riddle

sourceMeta.sampledFrom: synthetic — modeled after marplanner riddle block shape; adapted to qa-pair block shape
sourceMeta.sanitization: Riddle content is public-domain; no PII; date anchored to 2024-01-01

data.question: I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body, but I come alive with the wind. What am I?

notes: Covers: qa-pair block; riddle-block pattern (riddle/answer variant of the qa-pair shape).
